name: RPlog_Volunteering
title: Volunteering: An Imperial Defector Enlists
summary: In his office on Caspar, the gruff, battle-hungry Sarian Admiral Camrath Kizuka is bogged down in paperwork when the exiled former Imperial officer Lynae Cassius arrives to petition for a place in the neutral CDU navy. She lays out her unusual record--a decade of service as a medical doctor, exotic-disease researcher, surgeon, and pilot who rose to Commodore, having both saved and taken countless lives, including carrying out the bombing of Cochran. Kizuka, valuing surgical skill over command pedigree, offers her a captaincy in the medical branch rather than a mere lieutenant's combat post, and gently cautions that her evident hunger to fight worries him in a power that survives by avoiding bloodshed. Lynae accepts the medical role while requesting the chance to earn additional command training, insisting she needs to be 'fighting' again--whether in combat or to save lives--rather than living a half-life as a civilian. Kizuka orders her to report to Trinumvira for processing, Caspianisation, and escape-and-evasion training, and the two part with a handshake welcoming her, conditionally, into the navy.
